_doc: Portal Second Age (P02) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/p02.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 70C / 45U / 35R / 0M. Collation: sequential, 10x11 sheets, single 110-card common run (C1/C2). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set with more commons but fewer uncommons/rares than a normal small set. Pre-foil era (1998), no foils. Three variations of each basic land; 2 basic lands per pack. Printed in USA and Belgium; US printing modeled. 36 packs per box.

draft.tagline: 9 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare · 1 basic land · no foil
